publicInfo.bio:
Hello!

Thank you for visiting my website.

I started photography 'a few' years ago, while in high school, and have always been fascinated by people photography, looking to capture emotions. Though my travels have given me the opportunity to capture many of the most beautiful sceneries in many parts of the world, what drives me is people.

I mainly work in studio and portraits, personal or family, are my focus points.

I am a self-taught fashion designer and founder of a swimwear and resort wear brand that I design and create independently.
Needless to mention that I am passionate about fashion and modeling! Alongside building my brand as a young entrepreneur, I aspire to develop my modeling career and gain more experience in front of the camera.

Professional fashion model with experience in national and international fashion shows, pageantry, brand shoots, TV commercials, editorial shoots and billboards.
Crowned Miss Planet Mauritius in 2024 and represented Mauritius internationally, in Cambodia in November 2024.

Hello, I'm Ms Shhrutti Duth Lochun, from Curepipe. I'm an officer in the financial sector. I believe I have the desired height, slimness and willingness to join the modelling world. I am not a professional, but with the right guide, I know I can improve and become up to the required level. I worked for some 4 ads already and the last one was for Jetha Tulsidas, produced by Social Dodo. I'm thrilled to send my application for your purview and remain available on the provided contact details for any more info, that might be needed.

Hi, my name Estella Applasamy.  I’m very interested in model. I don’t have modeling experience yet, but I’m motivated, confident amd ready to learn. I would love the opportunity to 
work with you and grow in the 
 industry. Thank you for your time!
I am an editorial & portraiture photographer.

Fashion model with a strong interest in editorial, commercial and lifestyle shoots. Comfortable in front of the camera, I am professional, adaptable and easy to work with. Open to new creative projects and collaborations worldwide.

Sheena Conhye is a 23-year-old model and multidisciplinary artist based in Rose Hill, Mauritius. With a strong background in CG art, photo retouching, 3D virtual staging, and a keen eye for cinematography and photography, Sheena brings a rare creative depth to every project she’s part of. Her understanding of composition, lighting, movement, and visual storytelling allows her to actively contribute to making photoshoots more creative, intentional, and visually compelling.

Sheena has participated in several fashion shows, including the ADI Fashion Show 2025 and the University of Mauritius Divali Fashion Show 2024, and has been featured in various creative shoots such as boat shoots and a professional shoot with Eagle Insurance. Known for her artistic vision and collaborative mindset, she enjoys exploring unique concepts and pushing creative boundaries on set.

Driven by a passion for fashion and visual art, Sheena aspires to travel the world, experience diverse fashion cultures, and walk runways internationally while continuing to grow as both a model and creative professional.

data.name: Alizé Nauvel
data.bio: My journey started with participating in diverse photoshoots as a model, eventually paving the way for my competition in Miss Planet International 2025.

publicInfo.bio: My journey started with participating in diverse photoshoots as a model, eventually paving the way for my competition in Miss Planet International 2025.

Confident and professional model with experience in hair, skincare, and runway modeling. I have worked as a hair model for Sasha Hair Academy, participating in professional styling and  training sessions, and as a  skincare product model for  Yves Rocher, representing  the brand’s natural beauty  image. I have also 
catwalked for multiple stores at Centrepoint Mall, modeling fashion and accessories during live runway shows, demonstrating strong posture, audience 
engagement, and a polished 
runway presence.

Hi, my name is Lea, and I’ve been a professional model based in Mauritius for the past three years. I’ve had the opportunity to work with a variety of local and international brands, gaining valuable experience across different projects.

In 2024, I was honored to be a Top 5 finalist at Miss Universe Mauritius—an experience that challenged me, inspired me, and helped me grow both personally and professionally.

Modeling is truly my calling; it’s something I could do all year long if I had the chance. While I’m passionate about the craft itself, influencing or content creation isn’t my focus—I prefer to let the work speak for itself.

Outside of modeling, I’m a beach-and-nature lover with a deep love for animals. I share my life with four dogs and two cats, and being close to nature is where I feel most at home.

- Miss planet Mauritius 1st runner up 2025
- confident
- Model
- Content creator

We are a premier advertising and marketing agency driven by both seasoned professionals and emerging young talents. As a full-funnel agency with offices in Ebene, Mauritius, our mission is to revolutionize traditional agency-brand dynamics by fostering seamless, collaborative relationships. We strive to break down barriers, challenge conventional approaches, and eliminate knowledge silos by bridging the gaps between creative, media, and digital disciplines.

French senior model based in Mauritius, available for lifestyle, commercial and advertising projects.
I bring a natural, elegant and authentic presence in front of the camera, suitable for brands looking for real, relatable profiles.
Available for local and international productions.

Modelling is a way for me to express myself.
Capturing emotions through a simple look,facial expressions and using body language all together.
It gives me the opportunity to not only be an artist but to be ART itself-I like to put a lot of accent on my tattoosas well as they are a big part of who I am,even though this style can be considered "atypical" - I believe that with the right tools,being different can be a superpower.
